01 / About

Established 2014
Perth, WA
Partnership

About the firm

A small firm, on purpose.

A boutique management consulting firm serving mid-market and government clients in Western Australia. Core practices in strategy, operations improvement, and digital transformation. Known for deep industry expertise in resources, government, and healthcare. The firm prides itself on senior partner involvement in every engagement — clients don't get handed to juniors.

02 / Facts

By the numbers

The firm at a glance.

01
4 partners, 12 senior consultants, 29 total staff
FY26
02
85% client retention rate
FY26
03
Average engagement length: 4-6 months
FY26
04
60% private sector, 40% government clients
FY26
05
Named WA Business News 'Emerging Professional Services Firm' 2023
FY26
06
Strong graduate program — 3 intake per year
FY26

03 / Partners

The partnership

The four partners.

Every engagement at Meridian is led by a partner — not handed to a graduate in a suit. These are the four people you would meet.

04 / Practices

Read about our six practices.

Strategy, operations, digital transformation, change management, government policy, and organisational design. All partner-led, all scoped tightly, all delivered with senior involvement throughout.

Practices

Meridian Advisory

A boutique management consulting firm based in Perth, working with mid-market and government clients across Western Australia. Founded 2014.
